caption: A man with a tall, grey, textured hairstyle and glasses sits in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt, a patterned bowtie, and tan suspenders. He wears large black headphones and faces a black professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him, a blurred background shows another person in green clothing and a sign that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS." A framed logo featuring a green shield is visible on the wall. Two overlays appear on screen: a logo on the left that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101." Across the frames, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his posture and gaze while maintaining his focus toward the right side of the frame. The background elements and equipment remain stationary throughout the sequence.
